title: Verify the presence of all help topics
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Verify that all listed help topics are present: Getting Started, Caller ID, Call Blocking, Sync, Contacts, Birthdays, Settings, My Profile, Privacy, and Contact Us.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Tap the back arrow in the header to navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Search for a specific help topic
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Tap the search icon in the header. | Enter a search term (e.g., 'Caller ID') and tap the search button. | Verify that the search results display the relevant help topic.
expected_result: The search results display the relevant help topic.

title: Verify the footer text
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Verify that the footer text 'POWERED BY HELPSHIFT' is displayed.
expected_result: The footer text 'POWERED BY HELPSHIFT' is displayed.

title: Click on a help topic
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Tap on a help topic (e.g., 'Getting Started'). | Verify that the selected help topic opens and provides relevant information.
expected_result: The selected help topic opens and provides relevant information.

title: Verify the accessibility of the screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Use accessibility features (e.g., screen reader) to navigate through the screen. | Verify that all elements are accessible and can be interacted with.
expected_result: All elements are accessible and can be interacted with.

title: Verify the usability of the screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Verify that the screen is easy to navigate and understand. | Check if the search functionality works as expected.
expected_result: The screen is easy to navigate and understand. | The search functionality works as expected.

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help screen. | Log out of the app and log back in. | Verify that the Help screen is still accessible and displays the same content.
expected_result: The Help screen is still accessible and displays the same content.
